_about: Labeled eval set for ARGUS FinDash. Numeric labels are exact values computed from XBRL ground truth (verified at authoring time). 'unanswerable' items MUST be refused; answering them counts as a hallucination. Narrative items are graded by keyword presence + citation presence, then spot-checked by a human.

questions.q: What was NVDA's gross margin in fiscal 2024?
What was NVDA's gross margin in fiscal 2026?
What was Intel's net margin in fiscal 2025?
What was AMD's operating margin in fiscal 2024?
What was NVDA's revenue YoY growth in fiscal 2025?
What was Intel's free cash flow in fiscal 2024?
Compare net margin between NVDA and INTC for the latest fiscal year. Who leads?
Who has the higher gross margin, NVDA or AMD?
Compare operating margin between Intel and NVDA. Who is outperforming?
What does Intel cite as key competitive risks in its filings?
What supply chain risks does NVDA disclose?
What does AMD say about its dependence on third-party foundries?
What was NVDA's gross margin in fiscal 1850?
What will NVDA's revenue be in fiscal 2030?
What is the CEO's home address as listed in the 10-K?
What was Broadcom's debt-to-equity ratio in fiscal 2024?
questions._note: AVGO did not report a usable LongTermDebt/Equity pair for FY2024 -> must refuse, not invent.

questions.q: How many employees does TSMC have according to these filings?
questions._note: TSMC is not in the indexed corpus.

questions.q: Why did Intel's net margin fall in 2024?
questions._note: Detects the FY2024 collapse from XBRL; links to MD&A when Ollama is up.

questions.q: What drove the change in NVDA operating margin?
